overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's downtown district. The player traverses crosswalks, sidewalks, stairs, and plazas surrounded by towering futuristic skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage. The wet streets reflect the vibrant artificial lighting, creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere with moderate pedestrian and vehicle activity.

events.description: steps off the crosswalk onto the concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk and continuing along the city sidewalk past parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car parked along the street curb

entered.detail: wide yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing on the road
tall pole with illuminated walk sign and traffic lights
towering futuristic buildings with illuminated glass facades
building walls covered in bright neon advertisements and signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a city crosswalk at night, with the camera walking forward across yellow zebra stripes. The street is lined with parked futuristic vehicles and illuminated by vibrant neon signs on surrounding buildings. The player moves from the asphalt crosswalk onto a concrete sidewalk, passing sparse pedestrians in a dense urban canyon of glass towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairs leading to elevated pedestrian plaza

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete stairs to upper level
reaches the top of stairs entering the elevated plaza area

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs to reach the elevated pedestrian plaza above street level

notable_agents.action: white emergency vehicle with glowing blue underlights parked on the plaza

entered.detail: wide flight of concrete steps with metal handrails leading upward
elevated open pedestrian area with large paved tiles
futuristic ambulance with illuminated blue lights underneath
large metal highway overpass crossing above the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase from street level to an elevated plaza. Upon reaching the top, an emergency vehicle with glowing blue lights is visible parked on the plaza, while a massive overpass structure looms overhead. The surrounding glass skyscrapers remain visible in the background as the perspective shifts upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath the overpass structure
emerging from covered area into brighter open plaza with holographic lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor beneath the overpass, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction under the overpass

entered.detail: concrete underside of the elevated highway providing roof cover
thick structural concrete pillars supporting the overpass above
dark entrance opening to building interior with glass facade
large rectangular planters containing greenery along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive overpass structure, the scene becomes sheltered and darker, with thick support pillars lining the path. The corridor features potted plants and building entrances along the sides. As the camera progresses, the environment gradually brightens as it approaches the exit to an open plaza visible ahead, with palm trees and holographic displays becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with holographic displays and palm trees

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with wet reflective ground
approaching large green holographic tourist information display

agents.ego_description: wandering through the open plaza, observing holographic displays and neon advertisements on surrounding towers

entered.detail: large green glowing holographic display showing city map and tourist information
large rectangular planters containing tall palm trees with uplighting
shiny wet tiled ground reflecting the neon lights and holograms above
tall cylindrical structure covered in rotating digital advertisements
modern benches and seating areas for pedestrians along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a spacious plaza with wet reflective pavement mirroring the vibrant neon lights. A large green holographic tourist information display glows on the left, while palm trees in illuminated planters line the right side. The area is surrounded by massive digital billboards and cylindrical advertising towers, with the overpass structure now visible in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk alongside busy multi-lane road

events.description: leaving plaza and approaching busy street with moving traffic
moving traffic visible on the multi-lane road alongside the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the busy road with moving traffic and elevated highway

notable_agents.action: futuristic cars driving along the multi-lane road creating light trails

entered.detail: multi-lane road with moving traffic and illuminated vehicle lights
metal safety barrier separating the sidewalk from the road
raised highway structure running parallel above the street level
yellow and black safety bollards along the road edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions from the plaza to a sidewalk alongside a busy multi-lane road filled with moving futuristic traffic. A metal guardrail separates the pedestrian path from the vehicles, while an elevated highway structure runs parallel overhead. The glass skyscrapers of the city center remain visible in the distance as the camera continues along the urban thoroughfare.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit street crossing through a sheltered urban underpass and into a sprawling, holographic plaza. It begins by crossing yellow zebra stripes at a city intersection, moving from the asphalt onto a concrete sidewalk flanked by glass towers and parked futuristic vehicles. The camera then ascends a wide staircase to an elevated plaza where a blue-lit emergency vehicle sits beneath a looming overpass, before transitioning into the darker, sheltered corridor of the overpass supported by thick pillars and potted plants. As the camera emerges from this covered walkway, the environment opens into a spacious plaza with wet, reflective pavement, glowing green holographic displays, and illuminated palm trees. Finally, the scene shifts from the open plaza to a sidewalk along a busy multi-lane road, where a metal guardrail separates the pedestrian path from a stream of futuristic traffic flowing beneath an elevated highway.
